title: bradburya dubia
intro: Bradburya dubia is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Rubiaceae family which includes coffee and gardenia plants. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bradburya dubia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction by boiling the leaves and roots in water, and also used as a tincture by mixing the plant's extracts with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
